title: stevia conferta var. pilosa
intro: Stevia conferta var. pilosa, also known as Brazilian stevia, is a type of plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Stevia conferta var. pilosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and lowering blood pressure. The plant is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
